column20: MAb-11 is an anti-amyloid-β monoclonal antibody that carries 11 amino acid substitutions compared to gantenerumab. For the present study, we synthetized two cDNAs, encoding the light and heavy chains of a chimeric version of mAb-11, containing the mouse constant domains of murine IgG2a and the human variable domains of mAb-11.
